context: Bitcoin and Ethereum face mild headwinds as the CLARITY Act approaches Senate markup, with July 4 passage targeted by the White House. XRP leverage has flushed while price consolidates, signaling a wide-open next move. Overall crypto sentiment remains constructive despite modest 24h pullbacks across major assets.

tickers.thesis: Bitcoin consolidating after legislative tailwinds; CLARITY Act momentum supports structural upside. Key support holds above $78,500; breakout targets fresh ATH near $85,000.
catalysts: CLARITY Act Senate markup completion; targeted passage by July 4
ETF inflows resumption if macro sentiment improves
Macro: Fed policy trajectory; potential rate hold expectations
On-chain: Large holder accumulation patterns post-leverage flush
Geopolitical: Risk-on sentiment if equity markets stabilize

tickers.thesis: Ethereum lagging BTC but supported by L2 scaling thesis and DeFi governance clarity from CLARITY Act. Oversold daily RSI offers entry opportunity on demand zone hold.
catalysts: CLARITY Act passage timeline; regulatory clarity for ERC-20 and DeFi tokens
Shanghai upgrade momentum; potential staking yield changes
Institutional adoption trends; Ethereum-linked ETF flows
Macro: Tech sector rotation; risk-on appetite in equities

tickers.thesis: XRP leverage flushed on May 3; price holding while OI compressed signals wide-open next move. CME positioning shift and whale Coinbase transfer indicate accumulation phase; CLARITY Act approval catalyst remains primary tailwind.
catalysts: CLARITY Act Senate passage; regulatory clarity for XRP ripple effects
Whale accumulation signal; 90M XRP moved to Coinbase (early April)
CME XRP futures OI reset; fresh leverage building opportunity
Institutional adoption uptick; potential stablecoin tie-ins post-legislation
Macro: Risk-on equity sentiment; crypto funding rate recovery

insights.title: CLARITY Act Senate Markup: Structural Bid for Crypto Markets
insights.body: The White House has targeted July 4 for CLARITY Act passage, with a stablecoin deal removing a key legislative obstacle. This regulatory clarity is a primary long-term tailwind, particularly for Ethereum (DeFi/governance) and XRP (institutional adoption). BTC benefits from reduced regulatory overhang and ETF approval odds.

insights.title: XRP Leverage Flush & Whale Accumulation Signal
insights.body: CME XRP open interest collapsed on May 3 while price held, signaling completed leverage liquidation and a wide-open next directional move. Coinciding whale movements (90M XRP to Coinbase early April) suggest institutional accumulation—a bullish setup if the CLARITY Act catalyzes fresh buying.

insights.title: Daily Pullbacks Create OTE Entry Zones
insights.body: BTC (-2.10%), ETH (-3.55%), and XRP (-2.97%) have all compressed into demand zones on the daily chart, presenting Order Template Entry opportunities. Structural support holds across all three tickers; breakouts above daily resistance would target fresh 2026 highs as CLARITY passage odds increase.
